{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {

    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 2,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.7": "Engages with citations and provides a bibliographic reference.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.",
    "RX.4": "Introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the novelty claim and the cited foundation need verification).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.7: Engages with citations and provides a bibliographic reference.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested.
rationale.RX.4: Introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (the novelty claim and the cited foundation need verification).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
